title: HammerE - A new hammer enchantment
description: This mod adds a "Hammer" enchantment that allows you to dig up 3x3x2 territory at a time.
body:
This mod adds a "Hammer" enchantment that allows you to dig up 3x3x2 territory at a time. The purpose of the mod was the same - to replace hammers with one enchantment that is COMPATIBLE with picks from other mods.
This is my first mod, what do you think? next screenshots.
![Enchanted book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5c0e1011243a236f54d7481a00f3121abefd51.png)![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c41daf1f8e763c39fcf1dac08cea313f981ac4b.png)![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2910b5510dee5e419cdb8ce2d6248f4933bd1bd5.png)
**how install**:

You need to go to the launcher, go to the files through it, then go to the "versions" folder, and then select the version and open it. There is a "mods" folder - insert the file into it.

**The mod is translated into Russian and English!**

Enchantment can be obtained in two ways:
Find in structures or get enchanted in the table.
